sections.heading: Three-Mode Discuss System
sections.body: discuss-phase now supports three modes: exploratory (default — preserves uncertainty, marks options as grounded/open), discuss (standard steering brief), and assumptions (codebase-first inference with minimal interaction). Configure via workflow.discuss_mode in .planning/config.json or /gsdr:settings.

sections.heading: New Config Key: workflow.discuss_mode
sections.body: Added workflow.discuss_mode config key with values: 'exploratory' (default), 'discuss', 'assumptions'. Existing projects will use 'exploratory' as the default. No migration action required — the key is added automatically when config-ensure-section runs.
